retry_reason: kref_put always succeeds and is void; the object may be freed, so retrying would be a double-free.
contract_summary: Put wrapper: releases a reference on a drm_gem_object by decrementing its refcount via kref_put. If the refcount reaches zero, the object is freed through drm_gem_object_free. After calling this function, the caller must not access the object again. The function returns no value; the caller must ensure that no further references to the object are used.
